name: designbook-remotion-studio
description: Isolated Remotion sub-project for Design Book's book_video_* pipeline. Kept separate (own package.json + node_modules) so the designbook core stays zero-build / minimal-dep. lib/video.js lazy-imports @remotion/bundler + @remotion/renderer from here by absolute path; renders a video PLAN (designbook/lib/videoplan.js) to stills (facts) and MP4.
